legacyApplications.name: Cloud Cost Calculator
legacyApplications.technology: Vanilla JS, static HTML/CSS, inline XMLHttpRequests

legacyApplications.name: Retail Core Banking Ledger
legacyApplications.technology: COBOL, green-screen emulators, ASP.NET Web Forms wrapper

modernizationStages.title: Legacy Analysis & Discovery
modernizationStages.description: Comprehensive scan of application catalogs, dependency charting, complexity indexing, and API readiness evaluation.

modernizationStages.title: API Extraction & Core Foundation
modernizationStages.description: Creating robust RESTful APIs around legacy backends. Developing shared TypeScript data definitions and mock API structures.
keyDeliverables: Unified design system variables and mixins

modernizationStages.title: Incremental Module Migration
modernizationStages.description: Phased migrations. AngularJS claims portal transitioned to Angular 17. SRE calculators rewritten in Vue 3. React Core Host Shell established.

modernizationStages.title: Legacy Admin Retirement
modernizationStages.description: Gradual phase-out of the jQuery Global Admin Console. Transitioning features to React micro-frontends.
keyDeliverables: Complete retirement of AngularJS and jQuery dependencies

migrationRisks.title: Loss of Undocumented Legacy Rules
migrationRisks.description: Undocumented banking constraints and calculation logic baked directly into legacy jQuery DOM event listeners.
migrationRisks.mitigationStrategy: Exhaustive functional integration test runs comparing React outputs directly against jQuery live endpoints.

migrationRisks.title: Performance Regression in Data Grids
migrationRisks.description: SRE/DevOps grids rendering large tables with thousands of Kubernetes event payloads on slow hardware.
migrationRisks.mitigationStrategy: Leveraging virtualized list scrolling (e.g. vue-virtual-scroller) and server-side paging contracts.

migrationRisks.title: Session Synchronicity Across MFEs
migrationRisks.description: Loss of synchronization of authentication status between React Host and the Angular healthcare clinical application.
migrationRisks.mitigationStrategy: Implementation of a light shared BroadcastChannel and unified window event listeners.

roadmapTimeline.title: Shared Domain Models & Common Style Base
